name: React.js
description: The most popular JavaScript library for building user interfaces. Maintained by Meta.

name: Next.js
description: The React framework for the web, enabling server-side rendering and static site generation.

name: Tailwind CSS
description: A utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom user interfaces without leaving your HTML.

name: TypeScript
description: A strongly typed programming language that builds on JavaScript, giving you better tooling at any scale.

name: Framer Motion
description: A production-ready motion library for React that makes high-quality animations simple to implement.

name: shadcn/ui
description: Beautifully designed components that you can copy and paste into your apps. Built with Radix and Tailwind.

name: Supabase
description: The open-source Firebase alternative. Provides a database, authentication, and real-time subscriptions.

name: Prisma
description: A next-generation Node.js and TypeScript ORM that makes database access easy and type-safe.

name: TanStack Query
description: Powerful asynchronous state management for TS/JS, making fetching and caching data a breeze.

name: Vercel
description: The platform for frontend developers, providing the speed and reliability needed to deploy instantly.

name: GitHub
description: The world's leading AI-powered developer platform where millions of developers build and maintain software.

name: Figma
description: The collaborative interface design tool used by teams to create, prototype, and hand off web designs.

name: Postman
description: An API platform for developers to design, build, test, and iterate on their APIs efficiently.

name: Lucide Icons
description: A beautiful and consistent icon toolkit made by the community for modern web applications.

name: npm
description: The default package manager for Node.js and the world's largest software registry for JavaScript.
